meta.title: Residential Landscaping in DuPage County — Sunset Services
meta.description: Lawn care, landscape design, sprinklers, and seasonal services for homes in Aurora, Naperville, Wheaton, and across DuPage County. 25+ years.

hero.h1: Outdoor spaces that feel like home.
hero.subhead: Lawn care, landscape design, and seasonal services for DuPage County homes. Trusted by 1,200+ neighbors across Aurora, Naperville, and Wheaton.
hero.alt: A curated front lawn with mature plantings at golden hour in Naperville.

qualifier.body: If you own a home in Aurora, Naperville, or Wheaton and want one team for lawn, patio, and snow — without juggling three vendors — this page is for you.

servicesGrid.sub: Pick a service to see what's included, our process, and recent projects.

one.headline: 25+ years on DuPage homes
one.description: Erick founded Sunset Services in 2000. We've seen the seasons.

two.headline: Same crew every visit
two.description: Your lead won't change. Quality stays consistent.

three.headline: Bilingual team · EN · ES
three.description: Crew leads speak both. Quotes available in either.

one.quote: They took a backyard slope no one would touch and turned it into our favorite room of the house.
one.name: Sarah K.

two.quote: Same crew, same quality, week after week. Five years now.
two.name: Marco D.

one.q: Do you offer one-time visits or only contracts?
one.a: Both. Most lawn-care customers prefer a seasonal contract for consistency, but we'll do one-time cleanups, design consults, and project work without a recurring commitment.

two.a: Lawn-care and seasonal cleanup usually start within two weeks. Design and hardscape projects depend on scope — most book within four to six weeks of estimate sign-off.

three.a: Yes — site visit, measurements, and itemized estimate are free. Quotes land in your inbox within 48 hours of the visit.

four.a: Yes — we work with both individual homeowners inside HOAs and HOA boards directly. We handle compliance documentation, RFP responses, and standardized invoicing.

five.a: Yes — $2M general liability plus full workers' comp. Insurance certificates available on request before the first visit.

cta.body: Free estimate within 48 hours. No high-pressure sales — just a clear quote.

meta.title: Commercial Landscaping & Snow in DuPage County — Sunset Services
meta.description: Year-round maintenance, snow response, and turf management for office parks, HOAs, and retail across DuPage County. COIs on file before day one.

hero.h1: Property care that earns repeat contracts.
hero.subhead: Maintenance, snow response, and turf programs for office parks, HOAs, and retail across the western suburbs. COIs on file before day one.
hero.alt: A clean commercial entry with manicured plantings at mid-morning.

qualifier.body: If you manage offices, HOAs, or retail properties across DuPage and want a single team with a single property manager — uniformed crews, COI on file, no after-hours scramble — this page is for you.

servicesGrid.sub: Pick a program to see what's included, our process, and recent properties.

one.headline: COI on file before day one

three.headline: After-hours snow response
three.description: Live operator dispatch, 2-hour response after trigger.

four.headline: Dedicated property manager
four.description: Single point of contact, mobile + email — never a queue.

one.quote: Same property manager for four years running. They know our buildings and our budget cycles.
one.name: Lisa R.

two.quote: Snow event reports hit my inbox before I'm out of bed. Saved a tenant complaint last winter.
two.name: Mark T.

one.a: Yes — about 30% of our commercial portfolio is HOA properties. We handle board meetings, RFP responses, and standardized reporting on quarterly cadence.

two.a: $2,500 monthly recurring on 12-month contracts. One-time enhancements have a separate scope and minimum.

three.a: Yes — $2M general liability plus full workers' comp. COI is sent during onboarding before the first visit; additional-insured endorsements on request.

four.q: How fast is your snow response?
four.a: 2-hour response after trigger for commercial accounts. Storm-event reporting included; live operator dispatch 24/7 during snow season.

five.q: Do you provide single-point property managers?
five.a: Yes — every commercial account gets a named manager with their direct mobile and email. No call queue, no transferring between reps.

cta.body: Free site walk and itemized proposal within 48 hours. COI attached, no commitment.

meta.title: Hardscape & Unilock Pavers in DuPage County — Sunset Services
meta.description: Patios, walls, fire features, and outdoor kitchens by a Unilock Authorized Contractor. 5-year installation warranty. 25+ years in DuPage County.

hero.h1: Built to last twenty-five years and counting.
hero.subhead: Patios, walls, fire features, and outdoor kitchens — installed by a Unilock Authorized Contractor with two decades of paver experience.
hero.alt: A Unilock paver patio with seating wall and fire feature at sunset.

qualifier.body: If you want a patio, walkway, retaining wall, or outdoor kitchen built by a Unilock Authorized Contractor — engineering reviewed, base prep in-house, and a 5-year installation warranty — this page is for you.

servicesGrid.sub: Pick a service to see what's included, our process, and recent installs.

one.headline: Unilock Authorized Contractor
one.description: Awarded — not bought. Held for fifteen years and counting.

two.headline: 5-year installation warranty
two.description: Workmanship covered five years, no questions asked.

three.headline: In-house design
three.description: Designer, engineer, and crew lead under one roof.

four.headline: 20+ years on hardscape
four.description: Marcin's team has been laying pavers since 2003.

unilock.body: Unilock Authorization is awarded — not bought — to contractors who can prove consistent installation quality. We've held it for fifteen years and counting.

one.quote: Erick's crew rebuilt our front walk in two days. Three winters in, the joint sand looks the same as day one.
one.name: Patricia M.

two.quote: Our patio is the reason we stayed. Same crew sealed it the next spring without me asking.
two.name: James K.

one.q: How long does a typical patio take?
one.a: A 400–600 sq ft residential paver patio runs 5–8 days from break-ground to walkthrough. Larger scopes or weather-impacted weeks can stretch to two weeks.

two.a: 5-year workmanship warranty on the install. Unilock's manufacturer warranty on the pavers themselves runs separately and depends on the paver line.

three.q: Do you do design before construction?
three.a: Yes — most hardscape projects start with a concept conversation, scaled drawings, and a materials walkthrough. Design and build are separate engagements; you keep the plans either way.

four.q: What materials do you typically use?
four.a: Unilock primarily — Authorized Contractor since 2010. We can also work with Belgard or other premium lines on request, though our crew is most efficient on Unilock systems.

five.q: How does your project schedule work?
five.a: Spring builds typically book by late February; summer/fall slots open through April. We confirm a start window inside the quote and lock the date once the deposit clears.

cta.body: Free site walk and concept sketch within a week. Permitting and engineering folded into the quote.

meta.title: About Sunset Services — Family-run since 2000 · DuPage
meta.description: Twenty-five years on DuPage County properties. Meet Erick, Nick, and Marcin — the Aurora family running Sunset Services since 2000.

lead.line1: Twenty-five years on DuPage County properties.
lead.line2: Same crews. Same 6:30 a.m. start. No subcontracted surprises.

hero.alt: Erick on a DuPage County job site at golden hour, hardscape installation in progress.

story.p1: Nick Valle started the company in 2000 with one truck and a maintenance route across Aurora and Naperville. The first contract is still active, twenty-five years later.
story.p2: In 2018, Erick — Nick's son — took over operations. Same crew, same 6:30 a.m. start, same standard for what a finished property looks like. No subcontracted surprises; the people who measure your project are the people who do it.
story.p3: Marcin joined to lead the hardscape division — Unilock-Authorized installs, paver patios, retaining walls, fire features. The trucks share a yard; your job stays one phone call long.
story.alt: Erick and Nick working on-site together at a DuPage County property, late afternoon light.

team.h2: The people you'd be working with.

erick.bio: Took over operations in 2018. Runs every estimate himself — you meet him before you sign anything.

nick.bio: Started Sunset Services in 2000. Still on-site most weeks. The senior eye on the complicated jobs.

marcin.bio: Leads the Unilock-Authorized hardscape division. Patios, walls, fire features — specs to install.

cta.h2: Want to talk about your property?
cta.body: An estimate takes 30 minutes. We'll come measure, listen, and send a written quote within 48 hours.
